reviews.review_description:
This game used to be one of the only ones I played. Recently, games are glitchy and wont allow me to play.
Only option anymore is for the daily workouts and no access to anything else.
Sad, I'd pay a subscription to be able to access all games like it used to be, but as is - I log in once every other week (if even that) anymore...

29/04/2026 Cannot even reach a login menu... I wanted to try this app downloaded it from the official Meta Store but when launch quickly got popup that cut all sound...
 " Version Update required. Please update your version of Enhance in order to keep playing"
Only option show is "Quit"... No "Update" or "Go Store"

I check back the store if an update was there and nope everything look fine... So my guess is that the app server is close making this app unusable, since who know when as Meta don't show "last update date" to any apps/games

Meta should really add "last update" in "More Information" and remove unusable apps/games from the Meta Store

The review below edited because the app no longer launches - you can’t even get to a login screen. All access is blocked.

Previously, the app was designed to collect a baseline achievement score for each game (ie you can only choose to play it once). After that, you could only access games through the daily workout and the system chooses which games you play. I’d be fine with that, except it limits play to three games per day, one minute each, so 3 mins in total. I believe there used to be a paid pro version, which opened up the access to the other games and extended the daily workout to 8 mins a day.

I played some of the games, and now the g
ames say unavailable ???
When the glitches are fixed and the game stops crashing, it will be a fantastic game. Until then, not worth playing.

reviews.review_title: Can't proceed because of a game crasging
reviews.review_description: The jellyfish game constantly crashing, I am not able to proceed with the daily challenge. It just freezes and when force shut off at least for 30 seconds more you hear a broke sound from the game
Hands down the best brain training VR app out there!

reviews.review_title: It's got bugs but I really like it
reviews.review_description: There are some bugs in a few of the games.  Maestro doesn't seem to work at all but over all I really enjoy it and have been doing the daily workout everyday. I feel the benefits. I'm sure they'll get the bugs worked out.
This game (as good as it "Could" be) is coming up on a year (in June) with ZERO (I'll say it again), ZERO updates.... That is really unfortunate for a game that has so much potential...

reviews.review_title: Might be good but has fatal flaw
reviews.review_description: every time I try playing this, I get a connection lost message even though the game still plays. the connection lost window can not be dismissed and the app must be completely restarted so you lose any progress. then it just keeps happening nearly every game about half way through. no button will dismiss it. this makes it impossible to enjoy the game or gain any reliable stats.

First..let me say “this is a fun game”.......but.....I don’t know about advancing....I like the fact it goes backward in scoring if you fail....and the uniqueness of the games....

I personally am having tore feelings about how you pick up where you left of on the pizza’s....I feel like you need to work your way up to the speed you previously failed on with a “getting into a groove mode”.....


I also think you should be able to change your mood throughout the day if need be.....plus more choices..like tired. cranky, sick,...ect..

I’m not a QUICK one when it comes to speed on games....so I’m struggling already..so I’ll have to re-write another review in 30 days to see if this game has helped my memory or cognitive function any


              But overall “great game “
Didn’t even make it past signing up before my screen went black took 10mins to finally get a picture again I did end up uninstalling the app. I will try it again when it’s a little more stable
Great game for enhance and maintain your brain and motor/physical skills. Very interesting for people with disabilities, like me, i have a muscular dystrophy. Thanks
After spending time using this I have noticed an improvement  in myself. The games are challenging and fun.
Current version is not work
It's an wonderfoul app but, i have been trying to play it in the last 2 weeks and does not work, i was feeling my focus and memória improoving but...... can not play anymore
I play each day and love it. However, tutorial for game is missing. I have missed the tutorial for Maestro (my wife play one time under my name) and I don't have any method to replay the tutorial,

developer_response.body:
Hi there,
The Oculus has a button on the left controller called the menu button. If you press that you will get a menu show up, one of the items allows you to re-do the tutorial.
Please let us know if that helps.

reviews.review_description:
So far so good my first time playing and I love it. I love the workout challenges of the day it is a great addition to the gameplay can’t see what other challenges and games that will be added later on. Big ups to the developers. The collection of games that are single player and also great for cognitive stability. Also love that its tracks your improvements. 

I find myself dancing and moving my hips to the pizza game. I love it. I’m writing this review after only playing the pizza builder , memory wall, stacker, and assembly. Can’t wait to explore them all. I know I will find myself playing often with bowlingvr with is my fav.
Was impressed with the app. Good visuals and some great little games. only really started with it but looking forward to improving over time.

How is this game not on the official store?
What a great brain training game. While there are a few things I would change the game hasn’t glitched on me once. There are over 12 different brain games that I enjoy playing over and over to increase my score.  The games run well and are super polished. There is even a robot that runs you through tutorials and runs the games so it feels as if you have a teacher leading you! 

Keep up the great work!  I wish more people would know about this game to encourage development. It’s a great way to show new users the capabilities of VR and the most fun “brain training” I have ever had. 

-Harmonize doesn’t seem to move out of level 1 for me.
-React is a favorite but the pyramids and triangles can be confusing. One of these shapes should be removed or changed to maybe a pentagon? 
-I wish react would run for 1-2 minutes straight without switching levels or sides. I would love to get into a rhythm like some of the Lumosity games. I’m already at 100 without much of a challenge.
